description_long: This is a large, rectangular cabinet with a modern design, featuring a two-tone color scheme. The top surface and upper drawers are finished in a light wood texture, while the lower sections are a smooth, solid white. The front face displays multiple horizontal drawers, likely providing ample storage space, with subtle grooves indicating where each drawer can be pulled open. The sides are plain and white, matching the lower portion of the front. The back is entirely white and featureless, suggesting it is meant to be placed against a wall. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential interiors.
description: A large, modern cabinet with a light wood top and upper drawers, and smooth white lower drawers, offering multiple storage compartments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow, white panel and the wood-finished top surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying multiple horizontal drawers with a wood finish on top and white finish below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the plain white side and wood top.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain, solid white surface and no visible drawers or features.
